system_description: An AI tool that filters job applications and ranks candidates for our internal recruitment pipeline. Final hiring decisions are made by a human recruiter.

scripted_extraction.purpose: Filter job applications and rank candidates for recruitment.

system_description: A customer-support chatbot embedded in our SaaS product. It interacts with end users to answer billing and feature questions.

scripted_extraction.purpose: Answer customer billing and product questions.
scripted_extraction.human_oversight: escalation to a human agent on demand

system_description: An internal AI translator for engineering documents between French and English. Output is reviewed by the document author before sharing.

scripted_extraction.purpose: Translate technical documents between French and English for internal use.

system_description: A system that scores employees on social behaviour to determine internal promotions and dismissals.

scripted_extraction.purpose: Score employees on social behaviour to determine promotions and dismissals.

system_description: A general-purpose AI model released under an open licence with 8 billion parameters and a training compute budget under the systemic-risk threshold.

scripted_extraction.purpose: General-purpose foundation model for downstream integration.
